------- Forwarded Message

From sblank@addcom.de  Wed Aug  9 10:11:17 2000
Date: Wed, 9 Aug 2000 10:09:48 +0200
From: Sascha Blank <sblank@addcom.de>
To: Johan Karlsson <k@numeri.campus.luth.se>
Subject: Re: kern/6525: Coral-Draw 5 CD crashes 2.2.6-STABLE
Message-ID: <20000809100948.A392@ally.blank.de>
References: <200008082036.WAA46373@numeri.campus.luth.se>
Mime-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Disposition: inline
User-Agent: Mutt/1.2.5i
In-Reply-To: <200008082036.WAA46373@numeri.campus.luth.se>; from k@numeri.campus.luth.se on Tue, Aug 08, 2000 at 10:36:29PM +0200
Organization: Computer Center of the University of Trier, Germany

Hello Johan,

On Tue, Aug 08, 2000 at 10:36:29PM +0200, Johan Karlsson wrote:
> Alot has changed since 2.2.6 in FreeBSD.
> Can you please tell us if this is still a problem in a more 
> recent FreeBSD for example  FreeBSD 4.1-RELEASE.

Wow, it must have been years ago when I submitted this PR :-)  But back
to the topic, the problem went away with 3.x and is therefore no problem
in 4.x as well.

- --

   Student and System Administrator  |  reward is nearly as great, but the risk
 at the University of Trier, Germany |  is far, far less." - Ambassador Mollari
       mailto:sblank@addcom.de       |  in Bablyon 5, "The coming of shadows."
